name: current-2024-2026-role-feature-residual-ridge
description: Broad 2024-2026 test of using inferred role, defense, and foul-risk features only inside the residual-ridge correction layer.

notes: This checks whether role/foul features become useful when learned as residual corrections across multiple scoring environments.
The candidate is still not scout-enriched; all role values come from official-score residual proxies and official foul points.
